title: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 11?
description: Resolves YES if the price of BTC/USDT on the referenced exchange is above $72,000 at the specified settlement time on April 11. Other exchanges do not count.

metadata.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 11?
metadata.rules: This market resolves based on the BTC/USDT price on the named exchange at settlement time. Other exchanges do not count.
metadata.resolution: Settlement depends on the designated exchange price at the specified time and may use official exchange data.
